name: air-drow
description: AIR-DROW v6.5.0: Phase 6 real device-readiness diagnostics with privacy-preserving runtime verification, local hand-model checks and mobile browser capability reporting.

scripts.build: npm run verify:source && npm run build:static && npm run verify:deploy-output
scripts.verify:source: npm run icons:sync && npm run icons:verify && npm run updates:verify && npm run bootstrap:verify && npm run preflight && npm run foundation:verify && npm run completion:verify && npm run clean:verify && npm run visual:verify && npm run ui-phase2:verify && npm run hud:verify && npm run ui:verify && npm run check && npm run shape:verify && npm run workspace:verify && npm run loading:verify && npm run performance:verify && npm run sync:verify && npm run hand-phase3:verify && npm run phase4:verify && npm run phase5:verify && npm run phase6:verify && npm run fist-guide:verify && npm run calibration:verify && npm run hand:verify && npm run export:verify && npm run polish:verify && npm run final:verify && npm run model:verify && npm run boot:verify && npm run drawer:verify && npm run verify:release && npm run hand-source:verify && npm run camera-ui:verify
scripts.verify:deploy-output: npm run hand-loader:verify && npm run deploy-build:verify
scripts.model:ensure: npm run model:sync && npm run model:verify
scripts.vercel:build: npm run model:ensure && npm run build
scripts.verify:all: npm run model:verify && npm run verify:source && npm run build && npm run verify:release
